test_cases: TH-001 through TH-026 (Thai language + mixed content)

syllable_split_regression.description: Thai syllable splitter is producing incorrect splits across all 9 backends
syllable_split_regression.affected_cases: All Thai-only and Thai-mixed test cases

backend_timeout_pattern.description: ollama_mdes backend consistently timing out (8000ms threshold)
backend_timeout_pattern.pattern: Every call to ollama_mdes returns 'Ollama timeout' error
backend_timeout_pattern.root_cause_hypothesis: Ollama service unavailable or unreachable at expected endpoint

routing_key_empty.description: Deterministic routing key is empty string for all test cases
routing_key_empty.implication: Routing decision logic cannot differentiate between prompts

blocked_requirements.reason: Only 26 test cases in corpus (not 28). Routing key is empty, preventing deterministic routing validation.
Backend timeouts dominate (8s+ per call). Mean latency far exceeds 1ms target.
Routing key is empty, backend selection is non-deterministic. Cannot measure distribution consistency.
No cache layer present in regression test suite. Unable to validate.

primary_issue_1_thai_splitter.description: Thai syllable boundary detection is broken or regressed
primary_issue_1_thai_splitter.evidence: All syllable split expectations are not met across 186 variance cases
primary_issue_1_thai_splitter.impact: Cannot validate Thai language routing logic

primary_issue_2_routing_key_generation.description: Routing key generation returns empty string for all inputs
primary_issue_2_routing_key_generation.evidence: routingKey field is empty string in all 234 test results

primary_issue_3_ollama_connectivity.description: ollama_mdes backend not responding within timeout window
primary_issue_3_ollama_connectivity.evidence: 100% of ollama_mdes calls return 'Ollama timeout' error

golden_files_status.note: Golden files created with current (broken) baseline. These must be regenerated after fixes.

recommended_fixes_priority_order.fix: Audit limbs/thai-splitter.js syllable boundary logic. Likely cause: vowel mark handling or consonant cluster detection broken.
recommended_fixes_priority_order.estimated_effort: HIGH - requires deep Thai language understanding

recommended_fixes_priority_order.fix: Investigate model-router.js _routingKey() method. Verify it's receiving valid input and producing non-empty canonical keys.
Verify Ollama service is running and responding at expected endpoint. Check network connectivity and service health.

next_steps_for_chamu: 1. Coordinate with innova (lead dev) to fix Thai splitter regression
2. Verify model-router routing key generation with simple debug output
3. Confirm Ollama service health (curl endpoint or health check)
4. Re-run regression baseline after each fix to track improvement
5. Once blockers cleared, re-establish baseline with clean golden files

status_for_ticket_010.reason: Critical infrastructure failures prevent regression validation. Must fix before proceeding with routing SA review.
